item.title: Automated Quality Control for Roof Shingle Manufacturing with AI Visual Inspection
item.description: This was the first in our new industry-focused webinar series, where we dive deep into how Zetamotion’s AI-powered inspection technology tackles real-world bottlenecks in specific manufacturing sectors. By applying our Spectron platform and synthetic data capabilities, we show manufacturers practical ways to move from manual, inconsistent checks to reliable, real-time automated quality control, by boosting yield, cutting scrap, and delivering measurable ROI.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026 - Zetamotion
item.description: We kicked off 2026 with our first webinar of the year, Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026. The goal was simple. Look ahead at what is changing in machine vision, and talk honestly about why so many AI inspection projects still struggle to move beyond pilots and into full scale production.

item.title: Webinar on Tackling Quality Control with AI Vision - Elementary
item.description: Many manufacturers are exploring AI for quality control—but getting it working in production is still a challenge. From manual labeling to complex setup, traditional AI workflows can slow teams down. In this on-demand webinar, we share what we've learned from real-world deployments and show how self-supervised AI can simplify the process.

item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision - American Society for Quality
item.description: Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how hashtag#AI and hashtag#Machine hashtag#Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy.

item.title: Live Webinar – AI for Automatic Inspection: Fasteners and a New Standard in Quality Control
item.description: Explore how AI-powered vision systems are redefining fastener inspection — not just in theory, but in practice. Discover how machine learning enhances defect detection, reduces pseudo-rejects, and supports compliance with industry standards.

item.title: Webinar: Defect Detection and Optical Inspection Technology
item.description: Registered users can watch the full webinar here: https://www.lumerical.com/support/vid... Optical inspection technology has been evolving to address the ongoing shrinking of device dimensions and op

item.title: AI-Driven Power Line Inspection & Defect Detection Webinar - AeroMegh
item.description: Join us for this exclusive webinar where we'll demonstrate how AeroMegh's advanced GeoAI platform revolutionizes power line inspection and maintenance. Discover how AI-powered drone technology can dramatically improve grid reliability while reducing operational costs. What You'll Learn. AI-Powered Defect Detection Learn how machine learning algorithms automatically identify corrosion, damaged insulators, vegetation encroachment, and structural defects with 95%+ accuracy.
